title: Monolithic (MPWR) Soars 4.1%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
text: Monolithic (MPWR) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For March 2022

title: Will Chip Woes Dent Monolithic's (MPWR) Healthy Growth Momentum?
text: Monolithic (MPWR) has strong growth opportunity driven by a robust product portfolio and healthy demand trends, as the supply chain imbalance due to chip shortage is expected to gradually ease.
